qas.q: 1. What two ICMPv6 message types must be permitted through IPv6 access control lists to allow resolution of Layer 3 addresses to Layer 2 MAC addresses?
qas.a:
neighbour solicitations
neighbour advertisements

qas.q: Which range of link-local addresses can be assigned to an IPv6-enabled interface?
What would be the interface ID of an IPv6 enabled interface with a MAC address of 1C-6F-65-C2-BD-F8 when the interface ID is generated by using the EUI-64 process?
qas.a: 1E6F:65FF:FEC2:BDF8

qas.q: An organization is assigned an IPv6 address block of 2001:db8:0:ca00::/56. How many subnets can be created without using bits in the interface ID space?
When a switch configuration includes a user-defined error threshold on a per-port basis, to which switching method will the switch revert when the error threshold is reached?
qas.a: store-and-forward

qas.q: Which two statements are correct about MAC and IP addresses during data transmission if NAT is not involved?
qas.a:
-Destination IP addresses in a packet header remain constant along the entire path to a target host.
-Destination and source MAC addresses have local significance and change every time a frame goes from one LAN to another.

qas.q: What is one main characteristic of the data link layer?
qas.a: It shields the upper layer protocol from being aware of the physical medium to be used in the communication.

qas.q: What are three characteristics of the CSMA/CD process?
qas.a:
- A device listens and waits until the media is not busy before transmitting.
- After detecting a collision, hosts can attempt to resume transmission after a random time delay has expired.
- All of the devices on a segment see data that passes on the network medium.

qas.q: What are two primary responsibilities of the Ethernet MAC sublayer?
qas.a:
accessing the media
data encapsulation

qas.q: Which two commands can be used on a Windows host to display the routing table?
qas.a:
route print

netstat -r

qas.q: What are two functions that are provided by the network layer?
qas.a:
- directing data packets to destination hosts on other networks
- providing end devices with a unique network identifier

qas.q: Which two statements describe features of an IPv4 routing table on a router?
qas.a:
- If there are two or more possible routes to the same destination, the route associated with the higher metric value is included in the routing table.
- If a default static route is configured in the router, an entry will be included in the routing table with source code S.

qas.q: How does the service password-encryption command enhance password security on Cisco routers and switches?
qas.a: It encrypts passwords that are stored in router or switch configuration files.

qas.q: Why would a Layer 2 switch need an IP address?
qas.a: to enable the switch to be managed remotely

qas.q: What characteristic describes identity theft?
qas.a: the use of stolen credentials to access private data

qas.q: A user sends an HTTP request to a web server on a remote network. During encapsulation for this request, what information is added to the address field of a frame to indicate the destination?
qas.a: the MAC address of the default gateway

qas.q: Data is being sent from a source PC to a destination server. Which three statements correctly describe the function of TCP or UDP in this situation?
qas.a:
- The source port field identifies the running application or service that will handle data returning to the PC.
- UDP segments are encapsulated within IP packets for transport across the network.
- The UDP destination port number identifies the application or service on the server which will handle the data.

qas.q: A company uses the address block of 128.107.0.0/16 for its network. What subnet mask would provide the maximum number of equal size subnets while providing enough host addresses for each subnet in the exhibit?

A network administrator wants to have the same subnet mask for three subnetworks at a small site. The site has the following networks and numbers of devices:

Subnetwork A: IP phones - 10 addresses
Subnetwork B: PCs - 8 addresses
Subnetwork C: Printers - 2 addresses
What two pieces of information are displayed in the output of the show ip interface brief command?
qas.a:
IP addresses
Layer 1 statuses

qas.q: A user is complaining that an external web page is taking longer than normal to load.The web page does eventually load on the user machine. Which tool should the technician use with administrator privileges in order to locate where the issue is in the network?
qas.a: tracert

qas.q: A network technician is researching the use of fiber optic cabling in a new technology center. Which two issues should be considered before implementing fiber optic media?
qas.a:
- Fiber optic cabling requires different termination and splicing expertise from what copper cabling requires.
- Fiber optic provides higher data capacity but is more expensive than copper cabling.

qas.q: What technique is used with UTP cable to help protect against signal interference from crosstalk?
qas.a: twisting the wires together into pairs

qas.q: A network administrator is designing the layout of a new wireless network. Which three areas of concern should be accounted for when building a wireless network?
qas.a:
interference
security
coverage area

qas.q: Users report that the network access is slow. After questioning the employees, the network administrator learned that one employee downloaded a third-party scanning program for the printer. What type of malware might be introduced that causes slow performance of the network?
qas.a: worm

qas.q: Which scenario describes a function provided by the transport layer?
qas.a: A student has two web browser windows open in order to access two web sites. The transport layer ensures the correct web page is delivered to the correct browser window.

qas.q: What does the term "attenuation" mean in data communication?
qas.a: loss of signal strength as distance increases

qas.q: Refer to the exhibit. An administrator is trying to configure the switch but receives the error message that is displayed in the exhibit. What is the problem?
qas.a: The administrator must first enter privileged EXEC mode before issuing the command.

qas.q: Which two protocols operate at the top layer of the TCP/IP protocol suite?
qas.a:
POP
DNS

qas.q: A company has a file server that shares a folder named Public. The network security policy specifies that the Public folder is assigned Read-Only rights to anyone who can log into the server while the Edit rights are assigned only to the network admin group. Which component is addressed in the AAA network service framework?
qas.a: authorization

qas.q: What three requirements are defined by the protocols used in network communications to allow message transmission across a network?
qas.a:
message size
message encoding
delivery options

qas.q: What are two characteristics of IP?
qas.a:
- does not require a dedicated end-to-end connection
- operates independently of the network media

qas.q: An employee of a large corporation remotely logs into the company using the appropriate username and password. The employee is attending an important video conference with a customer concerning a large sale. It is important for the video quality to be excellent during the meeting. The employee is unaware that after a successful login, the connection to the company ISP failed. The secondary connection, however, activated within seconds. The disruption was not noticed by the employee or other employees.
qas.a:
security
quality of service
fault tolerance

qas.q: What are two common causes of signal degradation when using UTP cabling?
qas.a:
improper termination
low-quality cable or connectors

qas.q:
Which subnet would include the address 192.168.1.96 as a usable host address?
192.168.1.64/26
192.168.1.32/27
192.168.1.32/28
192.168.1.64/29
Which two statements describe how to assess traffic flow patterns and network traffic types using a protocol analyzer?
qas.a:
- Capture traffic during peak utilization times to get a good representation of the different traffic types.
- Perform the capture on different network segments.

qas.q: What is the consequence of configuring a router with the ipv6 unicast-routing global configuration command?
qas.a: The IPv6 enabled router interfaces begin sending ICMPv6 Router Advertisement messages.

qas.q: Which three layers of the OSI model map to the application layer of the TCP/IP model?
qas.a:
application
session
presentation

qas.q: What will happen if the default gateway address is incorrectly configured on a host?
qas.a: The host cannot communicate with hosts in other networks.

qas.q: What are two features of ARP?
qas.a:
If a host is ready to send a packet to a local destination device and it has the IP address but not the MAC address of the destination, it generates an ARP broadcast.
If a device receiving an ARP request has the destination IPv4 address, it responds with an ARP reply.

qas.q: A network administrator is adding a new LAN to a branch office. The new LAN must support 90 connected devices. What is the smallest network mask that the network administrator can use for the new network?
What are two ICMPv6 messages that are not present in ICMP for IPv4?
qas.a:
Neighbour Solicitation
Router Advertisement

qas.q: A client packet is received by a server. The packet has a destination port number of 80. What service is the client requesting?
qas.a: HTTP

qas.q: What is an advantage for small organizations of adopting IMAP instead of POP?
qas.a: Messages are kept in the mail servers until they are manually deleted from the email client.

qas.q: A technician can ping the IP address of the web server of a remote company but cannot successfully ping the URL address of the same web server. Which software utility can the technician use to diagnose the problem?
qas.a: nslookup

qas.q: Which two functions are performed at the LLC sublayer of the OSI Data Link Layer to facilitate Ethernet communication?
qas.a:
- enables IPv4 and IPv6 to utilize the same physical medium
- places information in the Ethernet frame that identifies which network layer protocol is being encapsulated by the frame

qas.q: The global configuration command ip default-gateway 172.16.100.1 is applied to a switch. What is the effect of this command?
qas.a: The switch can be remotely managed from a host on another network.

qas.q: What happens when the transport input ssh command is entered on the switch vty lines?
qas.a: Communication between the switch and remote users is encrypted.

qas.q: A disgruntled employee is using some free wireless networking tools to determine information about the enterprise wireless networks. This person is planning on using this information to hack the wireless network. What type of attack is this?
qas.a: reconnaissance

qas.q: What service is provided by HTTP?
qas.a: A basic set of rules for exchanging text, graphic images, sound, video, and other multimedia files on the web.

qas.q: A client packet is received by a server. The packet has a destination port number of 67. What service is the client requesting?
qas.a: DHCP

qas.q: What are two problems that can be caused by a large number of ARP request and reply messages?
qas.a:
The ARP request is sent as a broadcast, and will flood the entire subnet.
A large number of ARP request and reply messages may slow down the switching process, leading the switch to make many changes in its MAC table.

qas.q: A group of Windows PCs in a new subnet has been added to an Ethernet network. When testing the connectivity, a technician finds that these PCs can access local network resources but not the Internet resources. To troubleshoot the problem, the technician wants to initially confirm the IP address and DNS configurations on the PCs, and also verify connectivity to the local router. Which three Windows CLI commands and utilities will provide the necessary information?
qas.a:
ping
ipconfig
nslookup

qas.q: During the process of forwarding traffic, what will the router do immediately after matching the destination IP address to a network on a directly connected routing table entry?
qas.a: switch the packet to the directly connected interface

qas.q: What characteristic describes antispyware?
qas.a: applications that protect end devices from becoming infected with malicious software

qas.q: A network administrator needs to keep the user ID, password, and session contents private when establishing remote CLI connectivity with a switch to manage it. Which access method should be chosen?
qas.a: SSH

qas.q: What are the two most effective ways to defend against malware?
qas.a:
Update the operating system and other application software.
Install and update antivirus software.

qas.q: Which type of security threat would be responsible if a spreadsheet add-on disables the local software firewall?
qas.a: Trojan horse

qas.q: Which frame field is created by a source node and used by a destination node to ensure that a transmitted data signal has not been altered by interference, distortion, or signal loss?
qas.a: frame check sequence field

qas.q: A network administrator is adding a new LAN to a branch office. The new LAN must support 4 connected devices. What is the smallest network mask that the network administrator can use for the new network?
What service is provided by POP3?
qas.a: retrieves email from the server by downloading the email to the local mail application of the client.

qas.q: What two security solutions are most likely to be used only in a corporate environment?
qas.a:
virtual private networks
intrusion prevention systems

qas.q: What characteristic describes antivirus software?
qas.a: applications that protect end devices from becoming infected with malicious software

qas.q: What mechanism is used by a router to prevent a received IPv4 packet from traveling endlessly on a network?
qas.a: It decrements the value of the TTL field by 1 and if the result is 0, it discards the packet and sends a Time Exceeded message to the source host.

qas.q: A client packet is received by a server. The packet has a destination port number of 69. What service is the client requesting?
qas.a: TFTP

qas.q: An administrator defined a local user account with a secret password on router R1 for use with SSH. Which three additional steps are required to configure R1 to accept only encrypted SSH connections?
qas.a:
Configure the IP domain name on the router.
Generate the SSH keys.
Enable inbound vty SSH sessions.

qas.q: Which two functions are performed at the MAC sublayer of the OSI Data Link Layer to facilitate Ethernet communication?
qas.a:
places information in the Ethernet frame that identifies which network layer protocol is being encapsulated by the frame.
implements trailer with frame check sequence for error detection.

qas.q: An IPv6 enabled device sends a data packet with the destination address of FF02::2. What is the target of this packet?
qas.a: all IPv6 configured routers on the local link

qas.q: What are the three parts of an IPv6 global unicast address?
qas.a:
subnet ID
global routing prefix
interface ID

qas.q: A client is using SLAAC to obtain an IPv6 address for its interface. After an address has been generated and applied to the interface, what must the client do before it can begin to use this IPv6 address?
qas.a: It must send an ICMPv6 Neighbor Solicitation message to ensure that the address is not already in use on the network.

qas.q: A new network administrator has been asked to enter a banner message on a Cisco device. What is the fastest way a network administrator could test whether the banner is properly configured?
qas.a: Exit privileged EXEC mode and press Enter .

qas.q: What method is used to manage contention-based access on a wireless network?
qas.a: CSMA/CA

qas.q: What is a function of the data link layer?
qas.a: provides for the exchange of frames over a common local media

qas.q: What is the purpose of the TCP sliding window?
qas.a: to request that a source decrease the rate at which it transmits data

qas.q: What characteristic describes spyware?
qas.a: software that is installed on a user device and collects information about the user

qas.q: Which switching method drops frames that fail the FCS check?
qas.a: store-and-forward switching

qas.q: Two pings were issued from a host on a local network. The first ping was issued to the IP address of the default gateway of the host and it failed. The second ping was issued to the IP address of a host outside the local network and it was successful. What is a possible cause for the failed ping?
qas.a: Security rules are applied to the default gateway device, preventing it from processing ping requests.

qas.q: What service is provided by FTP?
qas.a: Allows for data transfers between a client and a file server.

qas.q: A user is attempting to access http://www.cisco.com/ without success. Which two configuration values must be set on the host to allow this access?
qas.a:
DNS server
default gateway

qas.q: Which two statements accurately describe an advantage or a disadvantage when deploying NAT for IPv4 in a network?
qas.a:
NAT introduces problems for some applications that require end-to-end connectivity.
NAT provides a solution to slow down the IPv4 address depletion.

qas.q: What subnet mask is needed if an IPv4 network has 40 devices that need IP addresses and address space is not to be wasted?
Which information does the show startup-config command display?
qas.a: the contents of the saved configuration file in the NVRAM

qas.q: What is the subnet ID associated with the IPv6 address 2001:DA48:FC5:A4:3D1B::1/64?

Users are reporting longer delays in authentication and in accessing network resources during certain time periods of the week. What kind of information should network engineers check to find out if this situation is part of a normal network behavior?
qas.a: the network performance baseline

qas.q: What characteristic describes a VPN?
qas.a: a tunneling protocol that provides remote users with secure access into the network of an organization

qas.q: Which two statements are correct in a comparison of IPv4 and IPv6 packet headers?
qas.a:
The Source Address field name from IPv4 is kept in IPv6.
The Time-to-Live field from IPv4 has been replaced by the Hop Limit field in IPv6.

qas.q:
A network administrator wants to have the same network mask for all networks at a particular small site. The site has the following networks and number of devices:
IP phones - 22 addresses
PCs - 20 addresses needed
Printers - 2 addresses needed
Scanners - 2 addresses needed

The network administrator has deemed that 192.168.10.0/24 is to be the network used at this site. Which single subnet mask would make the most efficient use of the available addresses to use for the four subnetworks?
What is an advantage to using a protocol that is defined by an open standard?
qas.a: It encourages competition and promotes choices.

qas.q: A network administrator is adding a new LAN to a branch office. The new LAN must support 200 connected devices. What is the smallest network mask that the network administrator can use for the new network?
What are three commonly followed standards for constructing and installing cabling?
qas.a:
cable lengths
pinouts
connector types

qas.q: A client packet is received by a server. The packet has a destination port number of 143. What service is the client requesting?
qas.a: IMAP

qas.q: What are two characteristics shared by TCP and UDP?
qas.a:
port numbering
use of checksum

qas.q: Which value, that is contained in an IPv4 header field, is decremented by each router that receives a packet?
qas.a: Time-to-Live

qas.q: A client packet is received by a server. The packet has a destination port number of 21. What service is the client requesting?
qas.a: FTP

qas.q: What attribute of a NIC would place it at the data link layer of the OSI model?
qas.a: MAC address

qas.q: A network administrator is adding a new LAN to a branch office. The new LAN must support 10 connected devices. What is the smallest network mask that the network administrator can use for the new network?
A user is executing a tracert to a remote device. At what point would a router, which is in the path to the destination device, stop forwarding the packet?
qas.a: when the value in the TTL field reaches zero

qas.q: Which two traffic types use the Real-Time Transport Protocol (RTP)?
qas.a:
video
voice

qas.q: Which wireless technology has low-power and data rate requirements making it popular in home automation applications?
qas.a: Wi-Fi

qas.q: Which layer of the TCP/IP model provides a route to forward messages through an internetwork?
qas.a: internet
